summary: Frontend testing completed for login→dashboard/admin connection with session data. All 13 features tested and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Login page correctly uses signIn from next-auth/react with redirect:false for role-based redirect
Dashboard page uses server-side auth() for greeting (Hello, User)
Dashboard header and sidebar use client-side useSession for user info display
Admin page uses server-side auth() for greeting and MongoDB for real stats
Admin layout uses client-side useSession for admin name in header
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Role-based access control working via middleware
seed_data_creation: Existing seed data used - 1 student user, 3 kelas in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: All login→dashboard/admin flows tested and working. Student login redirects to /dashboard with 'Hello, User' greeting, header and sidebar show 'User' name and 'student' role. Admin login redirects to /admin with 'Selamat datang, Admin' greeting, header shows 'Admin' name, real MongoDB stats displayed (1 peserta, 3 kelas). Access control working: student cannot access /admin (redirected to /dashboard), unauthenticated users redirected to /login.
tests_passed: Dashboard shows 'Hello, User' greeting from session
Dashboard sidebar shows user name 'User' and role 'student'
Dashboard header shows user name 'User' and role 'student'
Dashboard sidebar has logout button that works
Dashboard header has logout button in dropdown that works
Admin page shows 'Selamat datang, Admin' greeting from session
Admin shows real stats: Total Peserta (1) and Total Kelas (3) from MongoDB
Admin shows Kelas Terpopuler table with real data (3 classes)
Admin sidebar has logout button that redirects to /login

kelas_terpopuler: Unity Game Development Mastery (2,847 peserta, 4.9 rating)
